privileged_info_summary: The task requires research of FY 2024 Fair Market Rents (FMRs) for three US counties from the official HUD User website (huduser.gov). All FY 2024 FMR values have been verified against HUD's official documentation and authoritative sources. Miami-Dade County, FL (Miami-Miami Beach-Kendall FMR Area): Efficiency $1,683, 1-BR $1,884, 2-BR $2,324. King County, WA (Seattle-Bellevue FMR Area): Efficiency $2,211, 1-BR $2,269, 2-BR $2,645. Suffolk County, MA (Boston-Cambridge-Quincy FMR Area): Efficiency $2,212, 1-BR $2,377, 2-BR $2,827. All claimed rent ranges in task metadata are correct and contain the actual FMR values. The task data is real (from HUD's official FY 2024 FMR dataset), not synthetic.
